_meta.description: Labeled fixtures for classifier_validation Rules 11-14 (shadow ship). Keys match the gate's pred dict: ticker, direction, source_verbatim_quote, prediction_date, video_published_at, window_days, inferred_timeframe_days, timeframe_category. 'synthetic'=false rows are real prod predictions (generating_model='haiku'); the rest are hand-authored. Rule 13 should_pass cases name the ticker by SYMBOL so they pass deterministically with db=None (production additionally accepts company-name aliases via db, which is strictly more lenient).
